name: sutta-mcp
description: MCP server for finding the top matching Buddhist suttas for a user query.

interface.shortDescription: Find the top-3 matching Buddhist suttas for a question.
interface.longDescription: A local MCP tool backed by vector search over Buddhist suttas. It returns the top-3 matching suttas so the caller can choose the best answer.
defaultPrompt: Find suttas about grief and letting go.
Find the best sutta for anxiety.
